case_title: REBECCA PEARSON ET AL VS. ANNA WEINBERG

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $30.00- SERVED JAN-12-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WEINBERG, ANNA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LILLEE CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEINBERG, ANNA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,080.00, PLAINTIFF REBECCA PEARSON IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE FROM THIS MATTER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) REBECCA PEARSON, OWNER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LILLEE CO.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-21-2020 - JUDGMENT.PLAINTIFF REBECCA PEARSON IS PRESENT. COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF REBECCA PEARSON IS TO BE DISMISSED FORM THE CASE. DEFENDANT ANNA WEINBERG IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PEARSON, REBECCA LILLEE CO. AS TO DEFENDANT WEINBERG, ANNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-21-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF PEARSON, REBECCA LILLEE CO.
